headline: AI for Science: AlphaFold and the AI-Driven Discovery Revolution
description: AI for science is transforming discovery — AlphaFold 3 predicts all biomolecular structures, GNoME discovered 2.2 million new crystals, and AI-designed drugs enter clinical trials. The 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry for AlphaFold signified mainstream recognition of AI-driven science.

citation.name: Accurate structure prediction of biomolecular interactions with AlphaFold 3
